settings.title: Real Member Results
settings.subtitle: See what our resellers are achieving

settings.question: What exactly do I get when I purchase a package?
settings.answer: You get instant access to our full verified supplier directory, including 200+ wholesale and dropship suppliers, product sourcing guides, pricing sheets, contact details, and step-by-step setup tutorials. Everything you need to start reselling from day one.

settings.question: How quickly will I receive access after purchase?
settings.answer: Access is instant. Immediately after your payment is confirmed, you will receive an email with your download link and login credentials. The entire process takes less than 60 seconds from purchase to access.

settings.question: Do I need any experience to start reselling?
settings.answer: No experience needed. Our package is designed for complete beginners. We include step-by-step guides covering everything from setting up your store to contacting suppliers and fulfilling your first order.

settings.question: Are the suppliers verified and legitimate?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Every supplier in our directory has been manually vetted. We test response times, verify business registrations, confirm product authenticity, and check return policies.

settings.question: What kind of profit margins can I expect?
settings.answer: Our resellers typically see margins between 40% and 300% depending on the product category. Our guides show you which categories are most profitable right now.

settings.question: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied?
settings.answer: Yes. We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee. Contact our support team within 7 days of purchase for a full refund, no questions asked.

settings.question: Do you offer support after purchase?
settings.answer: Yes. All package customers get access to our private community group and email support. Our team is available 7 days a week.
